scripts.clean: node -e "['release'].forEach((dir)=>require('node:fs').rmSync(dir,{ recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: 10, retryDelay: 200 }))"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Capacitor shell does not require a local web build.')"
scripts.android:gradle:debug: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const path = require('node:path'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'gradlew.bat' : './gradlew'; const result = spawnSync(cmd, ['assembleDebug'], { cwd: path.join(process.cwd(), 'android'), stdio: 'inherit', shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.pack: pnpm run clean && node ../../scripts/require-public-origin.mjs && pnpm run build && pnpm run android:sync && pnpm run android:gradle:debug && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const path = require('node:path'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); const source = path.join(process.cwd(), 'android', 'app', 'build', 'outputs', 'apk', 'debug', 'app-debug.apk'); const targetDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'release'); fs.mkdirSync(targetDir, { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync(source, path.join(targetDir, `Music.Room_${pkg.version}_Android.apk`));"
